summary: Verified BUG FIX for Manifesto chapter title reveal animation. All three chapter titles (Evidence Before Conviction., Systematic Over Discretionary., Research Compounds.) are now VISIBLE and legible after scrolling manifesto-section into view. Inner motion span final transform is 'none' (y:0), heights 60-120px, text content correct, chapter numbers /01 /02 /03 and right-column body paragraphs all render as expected. Screenshots confirm.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manifesto MaskedTitle fix verified. Whileinview trigger on stable wrapper works; framer variants propagate to translated child. innerTransform reads 'none' after scroll (animation completed). Screenshots at .screenshots/manifesto_0{1,2,3}.png.
rca of the issue: Previously the whileInView trigger was on an element that itself was initially translated y:110% (off-screen). IntersectionObserver never considered it intersecting, so 'show' variant never fired and titles remained hidden. Fix: moved viewport trigger to a stable non-transformed wrapper driving the translated child via variants -> variants propagate and animation fires as soon as wrapper enters viewport.
